text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before the Arima Kinen,
Matikanefukukitaru visits a shrine to pray.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, having realized that victory is
something she must claim on her own, she finds
herself with nothing to pray for anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than asking for something, she stands
before the gods and vows to win the Arima Kinen.
